title: capsicum indicum var. ochranthum
intro: Capsicum indicum var. ochranthum, commonly known as the 'Wild Chillies', is a species of wild pepper plant native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Capsicum indicum var. ochranthum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Capsicum indicum var. ochranthum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
